Appearances:
Plaintiff Trinity Management Services is present. Represented by Jackie Lopez.
Attorney Daniel Borenstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Benjamin Artis is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Purdue, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-23-2012 remains on calendar.
